name: Basic Repeater
description: The Basic Repeater is the default starting pistol in a normal new game. It has no unique gimmicks and its stats are deliberately modest, with a notably small magazine for a repeater-style handgun. It mainly exists to ease you into early combat and is typically swapped out soon after.
notes: It always spawns with fixed components: a unique Bandit barrel, Tediore grip, no sight, no accessory and no elemental capacitor.
